note: Single source of truth for LLM model IDs used by the CHAD intelligence layer (GAP-037/038). All four hardcoded sites read this: chad/intel/claude_client.py (tiers + cost table) and chad/intel/advisory_engine.py + chad/intel/gpt_client.py (openai model). If this file is missing or corrupt, the code falls back to identical hardcoded defaults, so behaviour is unchanged. Resolves the gpt-4.1 / gpt-4.1-mini / gpt-5 split -> gpt-4.1 (the value configured in /etc/chad/openai.env OPENAI_MODEL and verified working 2026-07-16). Anthropic tiers are one generation behind current (opus-4-8 / sonnet-5) but ACTIVE and NOT the cause of the refresh 400 (that is Anthropic credit exhaustion); they are intentionally left as-is here because (a) the Anthropic account is credit-exhausted so the Claude tier is inert, and (b) a model upgrade is a separate behavioural change out of scope for INTEL-REPAIR.
